title: QualityGateStatus
description: Schema for quality-gate-status.json — ephemeral file written by C4Flow quality gate skills and read by gate resolution logic.

schema_version.description: Schema version — increment when structure changes in a backwards-incompatible way.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this file was last written.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which the results are considered stale. Default: generated_at + 60 minutes.

gate_id.description: Beads gate ID stored at creation time. Null when the gate has not been opened yet. Persisting this prevents the lost-gate-ID pitfall across Claude invocations.

overall_pass.description: True ONLY when every check has pass=true. Never true when any check pass value is null (not-yet-run). A gate with any unrun check is considered failed.

checks.description: Container for per-check results. All checks must pass for overall_pass to be true.

codex_review.description: Results from the Codex CLI code review subagent.

pass.description: Null means not yet run. True if and only if critical_count == 0 AND high_count == 0.

ran_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the review was executed. Null if not yet run.

critical_count.description: Number of CRITICAL severity findings. Any non-zero value causes pass=false.

high_count.description: Number of HIGH severity findings. Any non-zero value causes pass=false.

medium_count.description: Number of MEDIUM severity findings. Informational only — does not affect pass/fail.

low_count.description: Number of LOW severity findings. Informational only — does not affect pass/fail.

findings.description: Individual review findings from Codex, classified by severity.

severity.description: Severity level assigned by the code-reviewer subagent.

file.description: Relative path to the file containing the finding.

line.description: Line number of the finding. Null when line cannot be determined.

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the review outcome produced by the subagent.

bd_preflight.description: Results from the beads (bd) preflight check — validates that the environment is ready for gate operations.

pass.description: Null means not yet run. True if bd preflight completed with no issues.

ran_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the preflight was executed. Null if not yet run.

issues.description: List of preflight issues found. Empty array when pass=true.

check.description: Name of the preflight check that failed.

findings.message: Missing error handling for null return
Consider extracting magic number to named constant

codex_review.summary: No blocking issues found. 2 medium and 1 low findings for review.
